items.title: IBM Quantum Breakthrough And Voice AI Push Shape Enterprise Investment Case
items.description: IBM (NYSE:IBM) and research partners report the first experimental observation of a half Möbius electronic topology molecule using IBM quantum computing systems. The company also announces a partnership with Deepgram to integrate speech to text and text to speech capabilities into Watsonx Orchestrate for enterprise AI use cases. Both developments highlight IBM activity across quantum enabled research and applied AI tools for business users. For you as an investor, these updates sit at the...
